title: Support parameter names in pattern initialization
body:
Following the general guidance in https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/5593#issuecomment-2464838921

This seems to work, but the logic is split a bit. This is my first time looking at the codebase and I get a bit lost at the end of your described approach.

Is the LinkDotResolver the correct place to perform the lookup of the LPARAM? 
Should I be replacing the TEXT keyp in the tree rather than storing it in the AstPatMember? Rather than doing that later in V3Width?
